title: Event payload — lifecycle-transition
description: Payload schema for event.payload-subtype = 'lifecycle-transition' per D10 — workspace lifecycle phase change (boot, shutdown, persist, resume, per D7 §4). Closes D34 finding 5.2. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28.

trigger.description: Optional designator for what triggered the transition (e.g., 'user-action', 'scheduled', 'host-process', 'orchestrating-agent'). Open vocabulary.
